subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast tarried long at the Sacred Threshold, drawn by its sweet and perfumed fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من مکث امدا مدیدا فی العتبه الطاهره و انجذب بنفحاتها المعطره المتعطره
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant
